local_campbellton_bathurst.note: No exceptions — under $25/hr is an automatic reject regardless of role

toronto_gta.note: Must have clear path to $100k+ — reject roles without this trajectory

reject_rules: Retail, trades, healthcare, and other unrelated careers
Vague postings with no pay and no clear role description
Commission-only roles (unless explicitly approved by Matthew)

A.description: High priority — strong pay, strong match, strategic

B.description: Review — decent opportunity, needs manual decision

C.description: Interim income — acceptable but not strategic

D.description: Reject — do not surface to Matthew
